attributes.action: Stop all postal voting in council and General elections
attributes.additional_details: I want parliament  to debate potential  postal voting fraud because of the devastating  consequences it could have on the democracy  of this country.
attributes.background: Debate in Parliament  potential  fraud of postal voting

rejection.details:
This is in essence a duplicate of this petition that is already open, which you might want to sign instead:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762646
